rows.label: qev050104_MSG0001
rows.name:
Gwa ha ha ha! Your strength is the real
deal! You possess a perfect blend of
fierce power and beautiful technique![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050104_MSG0002
rows.name:
...I see now! I think I finally understand
why our master sent you my way.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050104_MSG0003
rows.name:
I do not possess your masterful
techniques. All I can do is
charge forward as I please.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050104_MSG0004
rows.name:
And until now... that fool Gi Ziorde was
always there to support me from behind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050104_MSG0005
rows.name:
During my battle with you, that
fact was hammered into me so hard
it made me sick to my stomach.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050104_JNK0010
rows.name: Advise

rows.label: qev050104_SEL0011
rows.name:
Recommend that he resume his
training alongside Gi Ziorde.

rows.label: qev050104_JNK0020
rows.name: Scold

rows.label: qev050104_SEL0021
rows.name:
Tell him off, demanding he grasp what
he lacks with his own two hands.

rows.label: qev050104_MSG0006
rows.name:
Hmm, true... At this rate, I will
never reach the level of a warrior
like you, not in a lifetime.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050104_MSG0007
rows.name:
You are... incredibly strong. It's pathetic
to admit, but it seems I cannot find that
strength without him by my side.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050104_MSG0008
rows.name:
...Hah! We had a massive argument. I don't even
know what face I should make when I see him... But
first, I'll ask our master which path to take.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050104_MSG0009
rows.name:
You must go and fight my
greatest rival and sworn
ally...! Go and fight Gi Ziorde![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050104_MSG0010
rows.name:
Someday, I hope you will cross blades
with me again! Until then—farewell![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050104_MSG0019

you for opening my eyes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050104_MSG0020
rows.name:
Heh. My greatest rival and sworn
ally...! I wonder what Gi Ziorde
thought after fighting you.[ST:wait ]
